heading: Our Approach
subheading: Real estate development, investment, and property stewardship across multiple U.S. markets.

pillars.title: Operating Platform
pillars.teaser: From acquisition to operations, I manage real estate assets with a hands-on ownership approach.
pillars.body: CoJo LLC is a real estate development and investment company focused on acquiring, improving, and managing residential properties. My work includes property acquisition, renovation oversight, tenant management, and long-term asset stewardship designed to create stable, income-producing properties.

pillars.title: Development & Commercial Strategy
pillars.teaser: Transforming properties through thoughtful renovation and strategic development.
pillars.body: I identify properties with strong potential and invest in improvements that enhance both livability and long-term value. My approach focuses on responsible renovation, thoughtful property management, and development strategies that support strong neighborhoods and sustainable property performance.

pillars.title: Capital Allocation
pillars.teaser: Investing in real estate opportunities that generate long-term value.
pillars.body: Through CoJo LLC, I deploy capital into residential properties with strong fundamentals and long-term growth potential. My portfolio includes residential investment properties across North Carolina, South Carolina, Texas, and Nebraska.

pillars.title: Governance and Board Leadership
pillars.teaser: Leadership grounded in strategy, accountability, and community impact.
pillars.body: In addition to leading CoJo LLC, I bring executive leadership experience and board service across nonprofit and civic organizations. This perspective informs my commitment to responsible development and long-term stewardship.
